title: The Aftermath of Egghead
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Emeth, Unknown person #3, Nami, Vegapunk as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ALRIGHTY!! Let's go while they're sleepin'!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
